political.s: Micro Center has received minimal reported political payments, with $33,579 in 2024 election cycle vendor payments. No federal lobbying expenditures reported in 2022. Company donations show mixed support, including donations to Democratic candidates in Colorado/Illinois alongside a $24,000 contribution to Vivek Ramaswamy's campaign.

charity.s: Micro Center partners with nonprofit Compudopt to donate refurbished computers to underserved communities and supports local schools through Intel competition prize donations. Company operates electronics recycling and donation programs launched in 2024 with focus on digital equity and e-waste reduction.
charity.focus: Digital equity, education, e-waste reduction, underserved communities

environment.s: Launched comprehensive electronics recycling program and partnership with Compudopt in December 2024 to reduce e-waste. Uses certified US-based recycling vendors with ISO 14001 and R2 certifications. Operates GPU trade-in program for extended product lifecycle and responsible e-waste management.

labor.s: Average employee salary approximately $33,513 annually. Employees receive commission-based compensation, health insurance benefits, and free on-site training programs. Workforce is 68% male, 32% female with demographic diversity (59% White, 16% Hispanic/Latino, 11% Black/African American).

dei.s: Micro Center has Glassdoor DEI rating of 4.2/5 stars, 21% higher than retail/wholesale sector average. Ranks in top 20% on Comparably for diversity score. Employee demographics show moderate gender diversity and racial/ethnic representation.

animals.s: Not applicable - computer and electronics retailer with no animal testing practices.

guns.s: Not applicable - retailer specializes in computers and consumer electronics, not firearms.

privacy.s: Micro Center states use of industry-standard SSL encryption and states it has not sold personal information in 12-month period prior to policy. Complies with California Consumer Privacy Act and state privacy laws. However, potential privacy violations investigation pending by Levi & Korsinsky law firm.

execPay.s: Not disclosed - Micro Center is private company with CEO Rick Mershad. Limited public salary data available for executive compensation analysis.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
